title: erucastrum virgatum var. baeticum
intro: Erucastrum virgatum var. baeticum, also known as Western rocket or wild arugula, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erucastrum virgatum var. baeticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and can also be consumed as a leafy green vegetable in salads and other dishes.
